---
title: "SHIVANSH SINGH"
subtitle: "Senior Data Engineer  |  Cloud Data Platforms"
format-links: false
format:
  html:
    css: style.css
    include-in-header: _meta.html
  typst:
    papersize: us-letter
    margin:
      top: 0.4in
      bottom: 0.4in
      x: 0.65in
    font-size: 9pt
    include-before-body: _typst-meta.typ
    output-file: "Resume-ShivanshSingh.pdf"
  docx:
    reference-doc: reference.docx
    output-file: "Resume-ShivanshSingh.docx"
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
::: {.contact-line}
[pro.shivansh@gmail.com](mailto:pro.shivansh@gmail.com) | [GitHub](https://github.com/shivansh-pro) | [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/shivanshsingh8/)
:::
:::

```{=typst}
#v(-12pt)
#align(center)[
  #text(size: 9.5pt)[pro.shivansh\@gmail.com #h(6pt) | #h(6pt) github.com/shivansh-pro #h(6pt) | #h(6pt) linkedin.com/in/shivanshsingh8]
]
#v(2pt)
#line(length: 100%, stroke: 0.4pt + rgb("#d0d0d0"))
#v(4pt)
```

::: {.content-visible when-format="docx"}
::: {custom-style="centered"}
pro.shivansh@gmail.com | github.com/shivansh-pro | linkedin.com/in/shivanshsingh8
:::
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
<div class="header-container">
  <a href="Resume-ShivanshSingh.pdf" class="btn">Download Resume - PDF</a>
  <a href="Resume-ShivanshSingh.docx" class="btn">Download Resume - DOCX</a>
</div>
<div class="header-container" style="border-bottom: none; margin-bottom: 0; padding: 4px 0;">
  <a href="resume-technical.html" class="btn" style="font-size: 0.62rem; padding: 5px 16px;">View Technical Resume (Detailed)</a>
</div>
:::

## PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

Senior Data Engineer with 10+ years architecting enterprise data platforms and ETL/ELT pipelines on AWS at national scale (50 states). Drove $360,000+ in annual cloud cost savings and 83% pipeline latency reduction. Partners with analysts and product teams to translate complex business requirements into reliable, production-grade data platforms. Currently pursuing Microsoft Fabric DP-600 certification.

## SKILLS

::: {.competencies}

**Cloud & Platforms:** AWS (Lambda, EMR, RDS/Aurora, S3, DynamoDB, Kinesis, Athena, SQS, SNS)

**Data Architecture:** Layered Pipeline Architecture · ETL/ELT Pipelines · Streaming & Batch Processing · Late-Arriving Data & DLQ Reprocessing · Schema Change Management · Multi-Source Data Integration

**Data Engineering:** Apache Spark · Apache Kafka · Apache Airflow · Elasticsearch · Data Quality Frameworks · Data Governance · Pipeline Observability · High-Volume Reprocessing

**Languages & Tools:** Python · SQL · Java · Terraform · Docker · GitHub Actions · CI/CD · JIRA · Git

**Leadership:** Technical SME · Cross-functional Stakeholder Management · Engineering Mentorship · Solution Architecture · Agile/Scrum · Technical Documentation

:::

## PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
::: {.experience-header}
[ROCKET COMPANIES (Rocket Innovation Studio & Rocket Homes)]{.company-name}
[Detroit, MI / Toronto (Remote)]{.company-location}
:::
[Data Engineer]{.job-role} [Nov 2018 - Jul 2025]{.job-date}
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="docx"}
### ROCKET COMPANIES (Rocket Innovation Studio & Rocket Homes) | Detroit, MI / Toronto (Remote)

#### Data Engineer | Nov 2018 - Jul 2025
:::

```{=typst}
#text(weight: "bold")[ROCKET COMPANIES (Rocket Innovation Studio & Rocket Homes) | Detroit, MI / Toronto (Remote)]
#linebreak()
#text(style: "italic", fill: rgb("#555555"))[Data Engineer | Nov 2018 - Jul 2025]
#v(4pt)
```

Built and maintained the enterprise data platform powering Rocket Homes' national real estate expansion.

* Designed and operated a two-layer pipeline architecture (Raw + Conformed) across all 50 US states, integrating structured exports, API payloads, event streams, and third-party feeds into a unified data platform.
* Architected Spark-based ETL/ELT pipelines processing millions of records across distributed EMR clusters with partition pruning, broadcast joins, and predicate pushdown, reducing pipeline latency 83% and maintenance overhead 30%.
* Consolidated 50 state-dedicated EMR clusters into 8 shared clusters ($300K savings) and migrated Aurora PostgreSQL to Serverless v2 ($60K savings), delivering $360K+ in annual cloud cost reduction.
* Built enterprise data quality frameworks with schema enforcement, business-rule validation, dead-letter queuing, and dry-run validation for 1M+ record reprocessing jobs, eliminating silent corruption risk.
* Built idempotent reprocessing pipelines for late-arriving data and Kafka DLQ recovery, including bulk reprocessing of 350,000+ records to directly enable a consumer product launch.
* Managed schema evolution in live production pipelines, adding enrichment and computed fields to conformed data structures while maintaining backward compatibility for existing consumers.
* Co-led enterprise CloudFormation-to-Terraform migration, designed reusable module library, and implemented CI/CD via GitHub Actions with deployment in under 10 minutes. Served as Terraform SME.
* Executed enterprise GitHub to GitHub EMU security migration maintaining 100% platform uptime with zero data loss.
* Directed Apache Airflow v2.8.1 upgrade with Docker-based local debugging, increasing developer velocity 25%.
* Owned Elasticsearch indices powering full-text search across millions of records with geo-bounding-box queries and faceted filtering. Managed DynamoDB pipeline state store with upsert patterns.
* Served as designated SME for PostgreSQL and Terraform migrations. Mentored junior engineers, authored onboarding documentation, and facilitated cross-functional alignment across Product, Analytics, Infrastructure, and Security teams.

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
::: {.experience-header}
[AMROCK (formerly Title Source)]{.company-name}
[Detroit, MI]{.company-location}
:::
[Software Engineer - Machine Learning]{.job-role} [Feb 2016 - Nov 2018]{.job-date}
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="docx"}
### AMROCK (formerly Title Source) | Detroit, MI

#### Software Engineer - Machine Learning | Feb 2016 - Nov 2018
:::

```{=typst}
#text(weight: "bold")[AMROCK (formerly Title Source) | Detroit, MI]
#linebreak()
#text(style: "italic", fill: rgb("#555555"))[Software Engineer - Machine Learning | Feb 2016 - Nov 2018]
#v(4pt)
```

* Built the company's first ML pipeline for mortgage document classification: K-Means clustering for automated training data preparation (saving 160+ hours per cycle), Naive Bayes classifier achieving 97% classification rate and 96% accuracy at scale.
* Architected Flask microservices for production model serving with versioning, latency SLAs, and failure handling. First model-to-production deployment in company history.

## CERTIFICATIONS & PROFESSIONAL DEVELOPMENT

* **Microsoft Fabric Analytics Engineer Associate (DP-600)** - In Progress (target: Q2 2026)
* **AWS Certified Solutions Architect** - Cloud infrastructure expertise (background credential)

## SIDE PROJECTS & INNOVATION

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
::: {.project-header}
[DriveBookAI - Multi-Tenant SaaS Booking Platform]{.project-name}
:::
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="docx"}
### DriveBookAI - Multi-Tenant SaaS Booking Platform
:::

```{=typst}
#text(weight: "bold")[DriveBookAI - Multi-Tenant SaaS Booking Platform]
```

Production-ready booking platform for driving schools. Multi-tenant PostgreSQL with RLS, stateless Node.js/Fastify API with Redis session externalization, embeddable JS widget, and AI integration layer (Claude API, Whisper).

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
::: {.project-header}
[SPX Options Analytics Platform]{.project-name}
:::
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="docx"}
### SPX Options Analytics Platform
:::

```{=typst}
#text(weight: "bold")[SPX Options Analytics Platform]
```

Platform for analyzing SPX options pricing and greeks. Multi-source ETL pipeline (IBKR TWS, Polygon.io), custom Black-Scholes greeks engine (first and second-order), and tiered PostgreSQL/Cloudflare R2 Parquet storage.

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
::: {.project-header}
[FuturesEdgeTrader - Multi-Agent Algorithmic Trading System]{.project-name}
:::
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="docx"}
### FuturesEdgeTrader - Multi-Agent Algorithmic Trading System
:::

```{=typst}
#text(weight: "bold")[FuturesEdgeTrader - Multi-Agent Algorithmic Trading System]
```

Algorithmic trading system for E-mini futures. Event-driven 7-agent Claude-powered pipeline, multi-broker execution (Rithmic, Tradovate, IBKR), dual-path PostgreSQL/Supabase data layer, and Telegram/Streamlit monitoring.

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
::: {.project-header}
[AI Real Estate Buyer Report (Hackathon)]{.project-name}
:::
:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="docx"}
### AI Real Estate Buyer Report (Hackathon)
:::

```{=typst}
#text(weight: "bold")[AI Real Estate Buyer Report (Hackathon)]
```

AI-powered tool for generating comprehensive real estate buyer reports. Multi-agent system with specialized data-gathering agents and a compiler agent synthesizing outputs into structured PDF reports. RAG pipeline with pgvector for semantic retrieval.

## EDUCATION

* **M.S. Computer Science, 2015** | University of Florida, Gainesville, FL | GPA: 3.8/4.0
* **B.Tech Computer Science, 2014** | JIIT, Noida, India | GPA: 8.5/10.0

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
::: {.last-updated}
Last updated March 2026
:::
:::
